/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/main.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/player.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/alien.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/level.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/hud.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/story.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/briefing.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/intex.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/gameover.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/game/end.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/engine/palette.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/engine/sprite.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/engine/alien_gfx.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/engine/typewriter.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/engine/tilemap.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/hal/video.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/hal/input.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/hal/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/hal/timer.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/hal/blitter.c.o CMakeFiles/alienbreed.dir/src/c/hal/hal.c.o -o alienbreed  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_mixer.so
